subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The written page became an open scroll, and its contents were clear and manifest. Two hands were raised in thanksgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی ورق مسطور رق منشور گردید و مطالب روشن و واضح بود دو دست شکرانه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
